svg.title: Allixer OCR system architecture
svg.desc: Flowchart showing how documents flow through preprocessing, prompting, LLM call, validation and output

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain what run.py does in the Allixer OCR system')
sendPrompt('Explain what main.py does in the Allixer OCR system')
sendPrompt('Explain the preprocessor.py image pipeline in detail')
sendPrompt('Explain prompts.py and how the domain registry works')
g.text: Builds system + user prompt + schema hint

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the medical schema and normalisation in detail')
sendPrompt('Explain the financial schema and normalisation in detail')
sendPrompt('Explain extractor.py and what DocumentExtractor does step by step')
g.text: Orchestrates all steps, calls OpenRouter API
Strips fences, parses JSON, validates output

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What model does Allixer OCR use and why OpenRouter?')
sendPrompt('What does the final validated JSON output look like for medical and financial?')
